name: NATURAL RESOURCE PARTNERS LP
summary: Natural Resource Partners LP (NRP) is a master limited partnership that owns and manages a diversified portfolio of mineral properties. The company leases coal reserves to operators who mine and sell coal, generating royalty revenues. NRP also holds an interest in Sisecam Wyoming LLC, which conducts trona mining and soda ash refining operations. Its assets span coal royalties and a soda ash joint venture.

products.name: Coal Royalties
products.description: Leasing coal reserves to operators in exchange for royalty payments based on production.

products.name: Trona Mining and Soda Ash Refining
products.description: Trona mining and soda ash production operations conducted through Sisecam Wyoming LLC joint venture.

partnerships.description: Joint venture partner conducting trona mining and soda ash refinery operations in which NRP holds an interest.
